title: argemone × hybrida
intro: Argemone × hybrida, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy or prickly poppy, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and ease respiratory issues. The health benefits of Argemone × hybrida include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce symptoms of allergies and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
